cataclysm_gear.title: Craft a Cataclysm-tier weapon or armor piece using Ignitium Ingots

cryptic_eye_dnl.title: Find a Dungeon Now Loading dungeon containing a Chaotic Hexahedron (Cryptic Eye ingredient)

subtitle.text: The chain ended. The portal has more slots to fill.

description: Cataclysm-tier gear uses Ignitium and Cursium Ingots.
This is some of the best pre-End combat equipment available.
The Cryptic Eye is the Disappeared Civilization's inheritance.
Dungeon Now Loading adds procedural dungeon structures.
The Chaotic Hexahedron is a rare loot drop inside them.
- create:experience_nugget (75% byproduct of any Crushing Wheel ore recipe)
Simple recipe but requires specific Dungeon Now Loading content.
The Nucleeper (alexscaves:nucleeper) is a related ingredient.
→ Find a Dungeon Now Loading dungeon with Chaotic Hexahedron [check]
